scenarios.title: Stockout risk triage
scenarios.subtitle: Scenario A
scenarios.summary: Intermittent SKU with critically low on-hand stock and elevated stockout probability in the synthetic backtest.

scenarios.title: Forecast model review
scenarios.subtitle: Scenario B
scenarios.summary: Champion and challenger are within 5% on MAE — too close to auto-promote; manual review is the correct governance outcome.

scenarios.title: MLOps readiness check
scenarios.subtitle: Scenario C
scenarios.summary: Cloud mode surfaces committed MLOps artifacts; local runs regenerate drift, registry, packaging, and Evidently reports.
